info.description: REST API for JAV metadata scraping and file organization
info.title: Javinizer API

get.description: Get a paginated list of actresses with optional search query and sorting

parameters.description: Sort column (id, dmm_id, japanese_name, first_name, last_name, created_at, updated_at, name)
parameters.name: sort_by

post.description: Create a new actress record with the provided details
Merge a source actress into a target actress with field-level target/source resolutions.
Build a merge preview and field conflict set for target/source actress IDs.

get.description: Search for actresses by name (first, last, or Japanese)
Retrieve a single actress by their database ID

put.description: Update an existing actress record by ID

delete.description: Delete an actress record by ID

post.description: Authenticate with username and password to create a session
End the current authenticated session
Set up initial admin credentials. Only available from localhost or with bootstrap secret when auth is not yet initialized.

get.description: Check if authentication is initialized and if the current session is authenticated
Get a list of batch jobs with operation counts

post.description: Scrape metadata for multiple movies in batch. Automatically discovers and includes all parts of multi-part files.

get.description: Retrieve the status of a batch scraping job

delete.description: Delete a completed or cancelled batch job and its temp files. Running jobs must be cancelled first.

post.description: Cancel a running batch scraping job
Exclude multiple movies from a batch job in a single request. Best-effort: excludes as many as possible and returns per-movie failures.
post.summary: Bulk exclude movies from batch organization

patch.description: Update a movie's metadata within a batch job's results

post.description: Mark a movie in a batch job as excluded from file organization
Re-crop a temp poster for the review page using fixed-size crop coordinates
post.summary: Update manual poster crop in batch job

post.description: Download a poster image from a URL and set it as the movie's poster in the batch job
Generate a preview of the expected output structure for a movie
Rescrape a specific movie within a batch job using selected scrapers or manual search input
Organize files from a completed scrape job (move files, download artwork, create NFO)
Generate NFOs and download media files in place without moving video files
Browse a directory and list its contents
Returns directory suggestions for a partially typed path

get.description: Retrieve the current server configuration including all settings for scrapers, output, database, and API. Returns the active configuration with runtime file path.

put.description: Update and save the server configuration. The server will reload scrapers and aggregator with the new settings.

parameters.description: Full configuration object with optional proxy verification tokens
parameters.name: config

200.description: message: Configuration saved and reloaded successfully

get.description: Returns the server's default browse directory. For Docker deployments, returns the first allowed directory (typically /media). For manual deployments, returns current working directory if no allowed directories configured.
Get a paginated list of structured events with composable type, severity, source, and date range filters

parameters.description: Filter by event type (scraper, organize, system)
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter by severity (debug, info, warn, error)
parameters.name: severity

parameters.description: Filter by source (e.g., r18dev, organizer, server)
parameters.name: source

delete.description: Delete events older than a specified number of days

parameters.description: Delete events older than N days (minimum 1)
parameters.name: older_than_days

get.description: Get event counts grouped by type, severity, and source
Get a paginated list of genre replacement rules

post.description: Create a new genre replacement rule mapping an original genre to a replacement

delete.description: Delete a genre replacement rule by original genre name

parameters.description: Original genre name to delete (alternative to id)
parameters.name: original

get.description: Get a paginated list of history records with optional filtering

parameters.description: Number of records to return (default: 50, max: 500)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Filter by operation type (scrape, organize, download, nfo)
parameters.name: operation

delete.description: Delete multiple history records based on criteria

parameters.description: Delete records older than N days
parameters.name: older_than_days

parameters.description: Delete all records for a specific movie
parameters.name: movie_id

get.description: Get aggregated statistics about history records

delete.description: Delete a single history record by ID

get.description: Get a list of batch jobs with operation counts and optional status filter

parameters.description: Filter by job status (organized, reverted, completed, etc.)
parameters.name: status

get.description: Get details for a specific batch job by ID
Get all file operations for a specific batch job with before/after paths
get.summary: List operations for a batch job

post.description: Revert file operations for a specific movie within a batch job
post.summary: Revert a specific movie within a batch job

post.description: Revert all file organization operations for a batch job, moving files back to original paths

get.description: Returns advisory information about later batches that share file paths with the target batch. This does NOT block the revert — it provides warnings only (D-07).
get.summary: Check for overlapping batches before revert

get.description: Get a paginated list of all movies cached in the database. Supports pagination via limit and offset query parameters. Returns movie count and basic metadata.

parameters.description: Max number of movies to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Retrieve movie metadata from cache by ID, optionally with provenance information

post.description: Compare existing NFO file with freshly scraped metadata, showing differences and merge preview
Rescrape movie metadata using selected scrapers only

get.description: Serves persistent cropped posters from the database. These persist across scraping sessions.

post.description: Test direct proxy or FlareSolverr access to a target URL using provided proxy settings
Scan a directory for video files and match JAV IDs
Scrape metadata from configured sources and cache in database

get.description: Get list of all available scrapers with their display names, enabled status, and configuration options. Scrapers are ordered by priority from config.
Proxies remote images for preview UI, handling hotlink protection and CORS issues.
Serves temporarily cropped posters from batch jobs. These are ephemeral and preserved when organization fails for retry.
List all active (non-revoked) API tokens

post.description: Create a new API token with an optional name

delete.description: Revoke an API token by ID, making it immediately invalid

post.description: Regenerate an API token by ID, returning a new token value and invalidating the old one
Fetch current character usage and limits from DeepL API
Fetch available models from an OpenAI-compatible base URL

get.description: Get the current version and check if an update is available. Returns cached status unless explicitly refreshed.

post.description: Force a check for the latest version and update the cache.

get.description: Check API health status and list all enabled scrapers. Returns version information and build metadata.

WebSocket endpoint for real-time progress updates during batch operations. Connect to receive streaming updates for batch scrape jobs, file organization, and downloads. Message format: JSON with job_id, type (progress/complete/error/cancelled), file, progress (0.0-1.0), message, and bytes_processed fields.

auto_add.description: Automatically add new actresses to database

convert_alias.description: Convert actress names using alias database

enabled.description: Enable actress image lookup from database

debug_visible.description: Show browser window for debugging (default: false)

fields.description: Movie field names assigned to this tier

weight.description: Percentage weight (0-100, must sum to 100 across tiers)

log_level.description: Database query logging: silent, error, warn, info (default: silent)

max_retries.description: Max retry attempts for FlareSolverr calls (default: 3)

auto_add.description: Automatically add new genres to database (identity mapping)

max_age_days.description: Max age in days to keep log files (0 = no limit)

max_backups.description: Max number of old log files to keep (0 = unlimited)

max_size_mb.description: Max size in MB before rotation (0 = no rotation)

cli_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for CLI execution (default: 30)

add_generic_role.description: Add generic "Actress" role to all actresses

alt_name_role.description: Use alternate name (Japanese) in role field

per_file.description: Create separate NFO for each multi-part file

enable_thinking.description: Toggle reasoning/thinking when supported by the backend

allow_revert.description: Enable revert operations (default: false — opt-in for safety)

download_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for HTTP downloads (default: 60)

first_name_order.description: true = FirstName LastName, false = LastName FirstName (default: false)

group_actress.description: Replace multiple actresses with group name in templates (default: false)

group_actress_name.description: Folder name when group_actress is enabled and multiple actresses (default: "@Group")

rename_file.description: Rename files using file_format template (default: true)

priority.description:
Priority is the global scraper execution order.
If empty, derived from registered scraper priorities at initialization.
If set, used directly for all metadata fields that lack a Fields override.

profile.description: Named profile to use (for scraper-specific overrides)

flaresolverr.description: Global FlareSolverr config for Cloudflare bypass

proxy.description: Default HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy for scraper requests

referer.description: Referer header for CDN compatibility (default: https://www.dmm.co.jp/)

scrape_actress.description: NEW: Global scrape_actress default (opt-out behavior, default: true)

temp_dir.description:
TempDir is the base directory for temporary files (default: "data/temp").
Can be overridden with JAVINIZER_TEMP_DIR environment variable.
Subdirectory "posters/{jobID}" is created for batch job temp posters.

umask.description:
Umask for file creation (e.g., "002" for rwxrwxr-x)
Can be overridden with UMASK environment variable

version_check_enabled.description: VersionCheckEnabled enables checking for new releases

version_check_interval_hours.description: VersionCheckIntervalHours is the interval between version checks in hours

enabled.description: Enable per-movie tag lookup from database

apply_to_primary.description: Replace primary movie metadata with translated text

overwrite_existing_target.description: Overwrite target-language translation if already present

source_language.description: Source language code (e.g., en, ja, auto)

target_language.description: Target language code (e.g., en, ja, zh)

description.example: Enable detailed actress data scraping from DMM (may be slower)

dmm_id.description: Real DMM actress ID when available (unique only for values > 0)

preset.description: Merge strategy preset: conservative, gap-fill, aggressive (overrides scalar/array strategies)

scalar_strategy.description: For Update mode: prefer-nfo, prefer-scraper, preserve-existing, fill-missing-only

operation_mode.description: Override config.output.operation_mode: organize, in-place, in-place-norenamefolder, metadata-artwork, preview

preset.description: Merge strategy preset: conservative, gap-fill, aggressive (overrides scalar/array strategies)

scalar_strategy.description: For Update mode: prefer-nfo, prefer-scraper, preserve-existing, fill-missing-only

update.description: Update mode: only create/update metadata files without moving video files

merge_stats.description: Merge statistics when NFO merging occurred

movie.description: Optional movie override for previewing unsaved edits

nfo_paths.description: For per_file=true multi-part: all NFO file paths

operation_mode.description: Which mode was used for preview

trailer_path.description: Empty if trailer download disabled or no trailer URL

video_files.description: For multi-part files: all video file paths

merge_stats.description: Merge statistics when NFO merging occurred

array_strategy.description: Array field merge strategy: merge or replace

preset.description: Merge strategy preset: conservative, gap-fill, or aggressive (overrides scalar/array strategies)

scalar_strategy.description: Scalar field merge strategy: prefer-nfo, prefer-scraper, preserve-existing, or fill-missing-only

dmm_id.description: Real DMM actress ID when available (unique only for values > 0)

should_crop_poster.description: Whether poster needs cropping from cover
